title: Reforged Gets Balkon'd
description: Resource pack adding back the original Balkon's WeaponMod textures to Reforged
body:
# Reforged Gets Balkon'd

This is a resource pack that brings back old memories of Balkon's WeaponsMod. It contains Balkon's textures, just in case you prefer them to the new Reforged ones.  
If you want to delve into old memories, you've come to the right place!

## Compatibility

| Reforged \ Minecraft | 1.8+ | 1.9.4/1.10+ | 1.11+/1.12+ |
| ------------- | ------------- | ------------- | ------------- |
| v0.7.4 - v0.7.9 | [1.8-0.7.4](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reforged-gets-balkond/version/1.8-0.7.4) | [1.9-0.7.4](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reforged-gets-balkond/version/1.9-0.7.4) | [1.11-0.7.4](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reforged-gets-balkond/version/1.11-0.7.4) |
